title: Meta AI Boss Drops "Health-First' Bombshell In Battle With OpenAI, Google And Anthropic
description: Meta's top AI leader Alexandr Wang has said the company's future AI models will stand out by focusing strongly on health-related capabilities. The move signals a strategic shift as Meta competes with OpenAI, Google and Anthropic in the global artificial intelligence race.
content: Meta has signalled a fresh and unusual direction in the fast-moving artificial intelligence race. The company's highest-paid employee, Alexandr Wang, has said future AI models from Meta will be designed to stand apart from rivals by focusing heavily ... [2022 chars]

title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella Reveals He Uses 100 AI Agents, Says They Need Rules And Oversight
description: Artificial intelligence is evolving from basic chatbots to essential tools in various workplaces, handling tasks like coding and data analysis., Technology & Science, Times Now

title: Trump says to meet AI firms on government stake
description: U.S. President Donald Trump said Friday he would meet top artificial intelligence firms to discuss the possibility of the government taking a stake in their companies
content:
U.S. President Donald Trump said Friday he would meet top artificial intelligence firms to discuss the possibility of the government taking a stake in their companies to address public concern over AI.

title: Indian High Commission in UK slams ‘indecorous audience behaviour’ during CJI Surya Kant’s event
description: The video from the event that later went viral showed an audience member referring to the Chief Justice's remarks on India's democratic credentials in the context of artificial intelligence; Citing observations by legal commentators and rights advocates, she raised concerns about what she described as an increasingly hostile environment for dissent in the country
content:
The High Commission of India in London on Friday criticised what it termed ‘indecorous audience behaviour’ by a member of the audience during an event attended by Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant at Birkbeck, University of London.

title: Indian states are appointing AI Ministers. But do they matter?
description: Artificial Intelligence is becoming a must-have portfolio in government cabinets, but experts question whether the trend reflects policy depth or mere signalling.
content:
When artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming industries, economies and everyday life, can governance be far behind?

title: SpaceX Inks $30 Billion Computing Power Deal With Google
description: Earlier this year, SpaceX disclosed that Google LLC owned a 6.11% stake in the company at the end of 2025. Following the February merger of SpaceX with xAI, Musk's artificial intelligence and social media company, Google now likely owns roughly 5% of SpaceX.
content: Alphabet Inc.'s Google has agreed to pay Elon Musk's SpaceX $920 million a month for computing power as part of a cloud services deal that runs through mid-2029, its second such agreement with an AI competitor in a matter of weeks. Google will pay Sp... [3029 chars]

title: I wrote that, right? People forget using AI for help, research shows
description: People cannot reliably recall whether or not they used artificial intelligence to create a text after as little as one week, according to a new study.
content:
BAYREUTH: People cannot reliably recall whether or not they used artificial intelligence to create a text after as little as one week, according to a new study.
